sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root בָּנָה)-

(1) structure, manner of building, Psa 144:12.

(2) exemplar, model, according to which any thing is made (Modell), Exo 25:9, 40 Exo 25:40 2Ki 16:10.

(3) image, likeness of a thing, -Deu. 4:1618 ; Eze 8:10. Hence Eze 8:3, וַיִּשְׁלַח תַּבְנִית יָד “and he put forth (that which had) the appearance of a hand,” Germ. etwas wie eine Hand. Eze 10:8. Compare דְּמוּת No. 3.
